home.title: Welcome to a Small Corner of My Web
home.subtitle: Writing, projects, links, music, and a few slow-forming fragments of daily life are gathered here.
home.sloganTitle: A Line Kept for This Place
home.sloganCopy: Turn ideas into entry points, and entry points into workflow.
home.spotifyHint: When there is music playing nearby, a trace of it appears here.
home.tasksCopy: A few ongoing threads, the kind that may later become essays, pages, or new entry points.
home.tasksEmpty: Nothing new has been written down just yet
home.quickAccessCopy: Links that feel like bookmarks left near the edge of a desk, ready to be picked up again.

dailyCapsule.title: Break one sentence back into reality
dailyCapsule.desc: Each day starts with one sentence worth testing: what is it really claiming, and where does it become misleading?
dailyCapsule.empty: Today's capsule is not ready yet. It will be filled automatically.

sites.title: Site Navigation
sites.subtitle: Curated Resources
sites.noResults: No signals found from this planet...

links.github: Core hub for open source collaboration.
links.stackoverflow: Classic Q&A site for troubleshooting and search.
links.mdn: Baseline documentation for web standards and APIs.
links.vue: The core frontend framework used by this site.
links.tailwind: A utility-first styling system used heavily in practice.
links.vercel: Fast deployment and low-friction hosting platform.
links.strudel: Live coding tool for algorithmic music.
links.beepbox: Useful for quick sound effects and simple melodies.
links.wolframalpha: Search engine for math and computation.
links.chatgpt: General-purpose assistant for writing and ideation.
links.claude: Reliable for long-form reading and writing.
links.canva: Online design and template editing platform.
links.medium: English platform for technical and opinion writing.
links.yysuni: One of the linked friend sites.
links.elysiumstack: One of the linked friend sites.

tools.title: Toolbox
tools.subtitle: A shared workspace for creation, distribution, and lightweight operations.
tools.qrCodeDesc: Generate QR codes for text or URLs

toolDescriptions.thesisParser: Turn one sentence into a testable proposition, then expose its premises, limits, and real-world use.
toolDescriptions.blogAssistant: Prepare title, slug, excerpt, tags, and publish date before opening the real blog editor.
toolDescriptions.markdown: Draft and preview Markdown content quickly for article structure and reusable snippets.
toolDescriptions.qrcode: Generate shareable QR codes for articles, projects, and internal workspace destinations.
toolDescriptions.colorpicker: Turn theme colors into usable palette references for covers, cards, and visual polish.
toolDescriptions.todo: Track publishing and maintenance tasks so operations move from ideas into execution.
toolDescriptions.pomodoro: Tie focus sessions to creator workflows instead of keeping a timer isolated from the work.
toolDescriptions.json: Handle API payloads and config fragments while working on admin and content system tasks.
toolDescriptions.worldclock: Check multiple timezones quickly when scheduling posts, releases, or cross-region work.
toolDescriptions.calc: Keep fast math available as a lightweight utility instead of a primary workspace surface.
toolDescriptions.stopwatch: Retain quick timing for occasional use without giving it primary page weight.
toolDescriptions.encode: Run Base64 and URL transformations fast while debugging or cleaning pasted content.

colorWorkspace.activeToneDesc: All fields are driven by the same HSV state.

workspace.heroTitle: Put writing, publishing, and daily site operations into one workflow
workspace.heroDescription: This is no longer a loose pile of micro-tools. It is a workspace centered on blog production, share assets, and site upkeep. Start with a workflow, then open the specific tool.
workspace.recentDescription: Jump back to where you last stopped.
workspace.recentEmpty: No recent tools yet. Starting with the blog publishing assistant is the strongest default.
workspace.pinnedDescription: Keep your high-frequency workflows on the front page.
workspace.pinnedEmpty: Pin a few repeat tools here and the toolbox starts behaving like a real workspace.
workspace.workspaceEmptyTitle: Choose a tool above to start working
workspace.workspaceEmptyDescription: Prefer the content and operations groups first. Low-frequency generic utilities have been moved into the lightweight section.
workspace.workspaceHintTitle: Pick a workflow first, then go into the tool details
workspace.workspaceHintDescription: Recent activity is remembered automatically, and pinned tools stay on the front page. That turns the toolbox into something you open every day instead of a demo shelf.

content.title: Content Creation
content.description: Writing, structuring, previewing, and share-asset preparation built around blog and portfolio output.

operations.title: Site Operations
operations.description: Tasks, focus rhythm, and system fragments that help content work actually move forward.

utility.title: Light Utilities
utility.description: Generic helpers still exist, but they no longer dominate the primary workspace surface.

blogAssistant.title: Blog Publishing Assistant
blogAssistant.desc: Normalize title, slug, excerpt, tags, and publish date before you move into the real editor.
blogAssistant.aiDesc: Do not add more fields. Use the title, body, excerpt, and tags you already wrote to extract the thesis, angles, and closing shape.
blogAssistant.aiIdleCopy: Write the title, excerpt, tags, or body first, then let the assistant compress them into a thesis and workable angles.
blogAssistant.aiError: Failed to extract writing angles. Please try again later.
blogAssistant.identityDesc: Define how this post should look and be found before the full writing pass begins.
blogAssistant.contentDesc: Paste or sketch body content here to estimate reading time and generate a reusable summary.
blogAssistant.payloadDesc: This is the closest shape to a publish-ready payload and can be carried into the blog editor directly.
blogAssistant.readinessDesc: Use a minimal checklist to confirm whether the post is ready for editor handoff.
blogAssistant.suggestedExcerptDesc: A default summary extracted from the current body content.
blogAssistant.noExcerptSuggestion: Once body content is available, a reusable excerpt suggestion will appear here.
blogAssistant.tagsPlaceholder: Enter tags separated by commas, new lines, or Chinese punctuation

readinessHints.title: Lock the title first so the rest of the metadata becomes stable.
readinessHints.slug: Review the URL slug once the title is settled.
readinessHints.excerpt: Keep at least one explicit value statement so list cards do not feel empty.
readinessHints.tags: Aim for at least 1-3 tags for archive and relationship value.
readinessHints.content: The body is still short; consider adding more structure or context.
readinessHints.contentReady: The body now has {count} chars and is large enough for refinement.

thesisParser.title: Thesis Parser
thesisParser.desc: Paste one sentence and split it immediately into thesis, appeal, boundary, and a more stable takeaway.
thesisParser.placeholder: Paste a line, slogan, quote, meme, or proposition you want to test...
thesisParser.error: Failed to analyze the sentence. Please try again later.

fallbacks.thesis: The actual proposition behind the sentence will appear here.
fallbacks.appeal: Why the sentence feels attractive will appear here.
fallbacks.boundary: The conditions it depends on will appear here.
fallbacks.takeaway: A calmer and more practical reading will appear here.

blog.guestbookSubtitle: Welcome to leave your footprint here
blog.guestbookPlaceholder: Write what you want to say...
blog.guestbookLoginRequired: Please login to leave a message
blog.guestbookRule1: Comply with relevant laws and regulations
blog.guestbookRule2: No personal attacks on others in comments
blog.guestbookRule3: No pornographic, violent or vulgar content
blog.guestbookStreamHint: Independent scroll; does not affect article loading
blog.title: Title
blog.contentPlaceholder: Enter article content in Markdown format...
blog.saveHint: Fields marked with * are required for publishing; drafts can be saved and completed later.
blog.submitError: Failed to submit, please check network connection or GitHub configuration
blog.confirmClearContent: Are you sure you want to clear the content?
blog.confirmConvertToDraft: This will remove the article from the public blog and move it back to drafts. Continue?
blog.loginRequired: You need to log in to leave a comment
blog.name: Name
blog.emailPlaceholder: Your email (for notifications only, not public)
blog.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
blog.noResults: No articles match the current filters
blog.filterTag: Click to filter by this tag
blog.filterGenre: Click to filter by this genre
blog.filterArchive: Click to filter by this month
blog.dateRequired: Date is required and must use YYYY-MM-DD format
blog.tagsRequired: At least one tag is required
blog.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please check network or backend configuration.
blog.savePosterHintDesktop: Long press the image or use the button on the right to save it
blog.savePosterHintMobile: Long press the image to save it

glassDashboard.title: Glass Dashboard
glassDashboard.desc: A personal dashboard template centered on heavy glassmorphism and vivid gradients.

citeAI.title: CiteAI
citeAI.desc: An AI-assisted citation and research tool for academic writing workflows.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.desc: A personal portfolio site for projects and visual work.

common.stationGiftIdle: One sentence is waiting for whoever is willing to pause.

v3_1_0.0: Refocused the homepage into a personal welcome surface built around status, slogan, on-desk tasks, and music.
v3_1_0.1: Made the homepage status and task blocks editable from admin for low-frequency maintenance.
v3_1_0.2: Added Spotify authorization, callback, and now-playing routes to establish a live playback flow.
v3_1_0.3: Added a Spotify status panel in admin system ops to inspect env gaps, callback URLs, and token cache state.
v3_1_0.4: Refined homepage card edges, copy tone, search hierarchy, and light-dark contrast for a clearer single-screen layout.
v3_1_0.5: Completed system ops, asset management, and analytics fixes to reduce site maintenance cost.
v3_1_0.6: Polished the lightweight AI surfaces, station note flow, and editor preview details for smoother publishing work.

v3_0_0.0: Rebuilt the toolbox into a single-screen dashboard workspace to reduce scrolling and context loss.
v3_0_0.1: Replaced the unstable system color-picking chain with an in-page live color workspace.
v3_0_0.2: Unified the visual hierarchy of the tool header, filters, and main work surface.
v3_0_0.3: Fixed the timezone-related publish date shift in blog content.
v3_0_0.4: Completed the draft-saving flow and added an untitled placeholder for empty draft titles.
v3_0_0.5: Redesigned sharing posters with better glass layers, QR sizing, and light-dark consistency.

v2_7_0.0: Added click-to-zoom images for better reading flow.
v2_7_0.1: Reworked code block styling and copy actions for technical articles.
v2_7_0.2: Added automatic table of contents generation with scroll syncing.
v2_7_0.3: Expanded the sharing center with poster preview, QR output, and download.
v2_7_0.4: Improved sitemap and structured data generation.
v2_7_0.5: Fixed publish-time and update-time consistency issues.

v2_6_0.0: Improved image upload compatibility and file size limits.
v2_6_0.1: Added cloud image caching and instant local preview behavior.
v2_6_0.2: Refactored admin layout and sidebar behavior to fix scroll and hover problems.
v2_6_0.4: Hardened weather request timeout and fallback handling.

v2_5_0.0: Introduced a semantic CSS variable system instead of hardcoded colors.
v2_5_0.1: Expanded theme customization and generated color scales automatically.
v2_5_0.2: Improved hover feedback and glass layering across the site.
v2_5_0.3: Reintroduced and refined PWA installation and caching support.
v2_5_0.4: Fixed bottom overflow issues and comment i18n support.

v2_4_0.0: Fixed core performance and layering issues in filtering and auth modal flows.
v2_4_0.1: Improved copy feedback in the encoder and Markdown tools.
v2_4_0.2: Restored the centered homepage layout and added an update log module.
v2_4_0.3: Fixed weather location handling and dev proxy configuration.
v2_4_0.4: Added bilingual support to the homepage update log.

v2_3_0.0: Added a friend-links section and supporting icon set.
v2_3_0.1: Improved blog card date, heat, and metadata layout.
v2_3_0.2: Fixed style variable usage in the tools page.

auth.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your username and password
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed, please check your input
auth.confirmDeleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
auth.confirmDeleteAdminAccount: You are attempting to delete an admin account. This is a dangerous operation. Are you sure you want to continue?
auth.confirmDeleteAccountFinal: Warning: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. Are you sure you want to continue?
auth.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account, please try again later

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.customHint: Choose a base color and the system will derive a coordinated scale plus a glassy background treatment.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
admin.workspaceCopy: A calmer, denser management workspace focused on operations, moderation, and publishing flow.
admin.dashboardCopy: Publishing pulse, moderation queue, and system health in a single pass.
admin.blogsCopy: Review drafts, monitor status, and jump into editing without leaving the list.
admin.analyticsCopy: High-signal traffic numbers and popular post movement, framed for scanning instead of decoration.
admin.commentsCopy: Review, approve, or remove discussion without leaving the queue.
admin.guestbookCopy: Handle guestbook visibility and keep public notes tidy.
admin.aiCopy: There is no giant chat shell here. This surface only maintains three lightweight entry points: the daily capsule, the thesis parser, and Blog Assistant 2.0.
admin.systemCopy: Bring backups, object storage, and asset cleanup into one admin surface instead of bouncing between deployment and content tools.
admin.backupLocation: Backup files are stored on the server filesystem.
admin.r2NotConfigured: Cloudflare R2 is not fully configured.
admin.deletionPolicyCopy: Only images that are not referenced by any article can be deleted. Uploads use unique keys and immutable caching, and edge purge can run when a Cloudflare token is configured.
admin.homepageContentCopy: Maintain the homepage status, slogan, and on-desk list here at a low frequency. The Spotify card updates itself from the live playback API on each visit, so no manual setup is needed.
admin.spotifyStatusCopy: Shows whether the environment variables are complete, whether the callback URL is aligned, and whether the backend currently has a usable cached access token.
admin.homeStatusPlaceholderZh: For example: 最近在整理这个角落的光线与秩序，让它更接近一处可以久留的个人空间。
admin.homeStatusPlaceholderEn: For example: Lately I have been adjusting the light and order of this corner so it feels more like a personal place worth lingering in.
admin.homeSloganPlaceholderZh: For example: 愿这里既能安放好奇，也能容纳尚未说完的话。
admin.homeSloganPlaceholderEn: For example: May this place hold both curiosity and the things not yet fully said.
admin.homeTasksPlaceholderZh:
One task per line, for example:
完善首页个人信息层
接入 Spotify 正在听卡片
把待办任务前置到首页
admin.homeTasksPlaceholderEn:
One task per line, for example:
Refine the homepage identity layer
Wire in the Spotify now-playing card
Surface tasks on the front page
admin.deleteBlockedByReference: This image is still referenced by an article and cannot be deleted.
admin.trafficMetricHint: Visits and unique visitors come from the visits table and reflect traffic across site or article paths.
admin.readMetricHint: Article reads come from blogs.views and reflect cumulative detail-page reads, not unique visitors.
admin.relocateFailed: Failed to relocate. Please try again later.
admin.addAiSeedCopy: Manually add one sentence into the future capsule pool.
admin.seedSourceLabelPlaceholder: For example: manual note / self-written line
admin.seedSourceUrlPlaceholder: Optional. Whitelist validation will run when filled.
admin.seedTextPlaceholder: Enter one sentence worth breaking down.
admin.importAiSeedsCopy: Best for monthly replenishment. One line per candidate.
admin.importSourceLabelPlaceholder: For example: monthly refill / column excerpts
admin.batchSeedTextPlaceholder: One line per sentence. The system will deduplicate before importing.
admin.dailyCapsuleCopy: This is the daily object currently reused by the homepage and terminal.
admin.noDailyCapsule: Today's capsule has not been generated yet.
admin.aiSeedPoolCopy: Maintain candidate lines, filter noise, and directly choose which one should drive today if needed.
admin.seedSearchPlaceholder: Search by sentence, label, or domain
admin.noAiSeeds: No seeds match the current filter.
admin.activeAiSeedsCopy: Candidates still eligible for daily generation.
admin.unusedAiSeedsCopy: Active candidates that have not been pulled yet.
admin.dailyCapsuleStatusCopy: The homepage and terminal are currently reusing this entry.
admin.notUsedYet: Not used for the daily capsule yet
admin.loadAiFailed: Failed to load AI workflow data

seo.siteDescription: A personal workspace site built with Vue.js, combining blog, toolbox, navigation, and portfolio surfaces.
